He walked me though step by step on my account and informed me that I was submitting a wire reversal. He had me put all my information in as the receiver, so I thought this was legit. He had me copy down the account number and routing number that I was given. I told them my bank was contacting them and asked if they could freeze the account until investigation. After I notified my phone company to see how this happened and if I was hacked.
